prediction.hypothesis: LangChain (quality leader at t0 with 131k stars, 2.3x #2) will show LOWER relative ecosystem growth over 8 weeks than at least one framework with <60k stars at t0. Ecosystem growth = (commits_4w(t1)/commits_4w(t0)) * (forks(t1)/forks(t0)). This tests the Blackwell Dilemma: the most visible framework is not necessarily the healthiest.
prediction.falsification: If LangChain shows the HIGHEST ecosystem growth ratio among all tracked frameworks at t1, the prediction fails.
prediction.mechanism: C1: switching cost (workflow lock-in, API coupling) C2: quality signal (stars) misaligned with ecosystem health (commits, contributors) C3: stars/downloads do not reveal commit trajectory or contributor diversity
